TestInfo.name: framework/ROM/pickleTests/loadNorROMError
TestInfo.author: talbpaul
TestInfo.description: This test checks that a reasonable error is given to the user if they attempt to unpickle a pickled object that isn't a ROM.

revisions.revision: 'globalSeed' tag added to node 'RunInfo' to enable backwards compatability following updates made to randomUtils.py.
